content:
ITEM 4. MINE SAFETY DISCLOSURES
Not applicable.
INFORMATION ABOUT OUR EXECUTIVE OFFICERS
Executive officers of Abbott are elected [DATE_TIME] by the board of directors. Each executive officer holds office until a successor has been duly elected or appointed and qualified or until the officer’s death, resignation, or removal. Vacancies may be filled at any time by the board. Any executive officer may be removed by the board of directors when, in its judgment, removal would serve the best interests of Abbott.
Abbott’s executive officers, their ages as of [DATE_TIME], and the dates of their first election as officers of Abbott are listed below. The executive officers’ principal occupations and employment for [DATE_TIME] of appointment to the earliest reported office are also shown. Unless otherwise stated, employment was by [PERSON]. There are no family relationships between any executive officers or directors.
